title: Surgeon Vacancy at Stryker India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Stryker India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Stryker India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Meerut operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Stryker India:
Stryker India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Stryker India!
